steps.title: Distribute (d-6) across each term
steps.content:
Multiply each term in the first binomial by each term in the second:
  • $d \times 8d^2 = 8d^3$
  • $d \times (-3) = -3d$
  • $(-6) \times 8d^2 = -48d^2$
  • $(-6) \times (-3) = +18$
Combining all terms: $8d^3 - 3d - 48d^2 + 18$

steps.title: Rearrange by degree and match to the choices
steps.content:
Reorder $8d^3 - 3d - 48d^2 + 18$ in standard form (descending powers):

$$8d^3 - 48d^2 - 3d + 18$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
